Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.LearningToolElementAnswerWithWorkload

A structure to represent a Learning Tool Element Answer in itslearning together with its workload

NameDescriptionTypeAdditional information
AnswerId

The ID of this particular answer

 integer

None.
UserIds

The IDs of the users who will answer the assignment

 Collection of integer

None.

The Assessment Status of this particular answer

None.

The deadline as a representation string

 string

None.
Url

The url

 string

None.
LearningObjectId

The learning object ID

 integer

None.
LearningObjectInstanceId

The ID of the learning object instance

 integer

None.
UserId

The ID of the current user in the assignment service

 integer

None.
Workload

The workload (not set, low, medium, high) of the assignment

 Itslearning.RestApi.Entities.WorkloadType

None.
WorkloadDisplay

The workload term

 string

None.
WorkloadEstimation

The estimated workload of the assignment in minutes

 integer

None.
